name: Speed Test
description: Measure your internet connection. Live gauge, plain-English verdict, and history chart.
author: Asyar

commands.name: Speed Test History
commands.description: Browse past results with a trend chart

tools.name: Run speed test
tools.description: Measure the user's current internet download speed, upload speed, and latency. Call when the user asks how fast their connection is, complains it feels slow, or asks to test their internet. Takes ~15-25 seconds; the result includes Mbps figures, ping, and a plain-English quality verdict.

quickMode.description: Optional. When true, runs a faster (~5s) reduced-payload test for a rough estimate. Defaults to false.
